_comment: Organism-created helper tools. Auto-populated during nightly runs.

_schema.name: snake_case tool identifier matching the .py filename (without extension)
_schema.file: path relative to repo root, e.g. .agent/tools/count-component-props.py
_schema.description: one-sentence description of what the tool does and when to use it
_schema.trigger_pattern: the recurring task pattern that prompted creation of this tool
_schema.last_used_date: ISO 8601 date — update every time the tool is invoked
_schema.use_count: integer — increment each use; if 0 after 5 nights, flag for deprecation
_schema.deprecated: boolean — set true when flagged; delete file after one more night
_schema.deprecation_reason: optional string explaining why the tool is no longer needed
